name: Voice discovery
prompt: Help me define the brand voice for a fintech startup that makes payroll software for small businesses. They want to feel approachable but credible.

name: Tone spectrum
prompt: Map out how our tone should shift across our error messages, homepage, and sales emails.

name: Vocabulary guide
prompt: Build a vocabulary guide for a developer tools company — words to use and words to avoid.

name: Before/after examples
prompt: Give me before and after examples of our homepage headline rewritten in our new bold, direct brand voice.
